description: Use this API to return FACTS device model name. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, cval = fcdmnam(name)

error_codes.description: FACTS device not in network but in model tables; ‘CVAL’ returned.
FACTS device not in network or in model tables; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
No model in model tables; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
